task_2.serialization_test_dispatcher: FIXED — §TDD Anchor and §Details now mandate runTest(StandardTestDispatcher()), explicitly forbid UnconfinedTestDispatcher and runBlocking with rationale

task_3.applyMaxTokens_sequence_corrected: FIXED — TDD Anchor now asserts listOf("stopResponse", "cleanup", "initialize"), the dialog-state strings (heavyDialogShown, userConfirmed, reinitDialogShown) are absent
task_3.fakeModelRegistry_override_update: FIXED — §Details explicitly states: update override resetConversation (~line 1847) to new signature, add lastResetReason and resetReasons fields
task_3.ready_wait_ordering: FIXED — §What to do step 1 explicitly states ordering: applyEffectiveConfigToModel() first, then wait for Ready, then resetConversation
task_3.max_tokens_assertion_preserved: FIXED — TDD Anchor for applyLightOverrides_callsResetConversation_withLightOverrideReason includes KEEP existing config-mutation assertion assertEquals(512, model.configValues[ConfigKeys.MAX_TOKENS.label])
task_3.engineReady_combinatorics_removed: FIXED — grep for engineReady_combinatorics in tasks/3.md returns zero matches; the test is correctly owned by Task 6 only

task_6.engineReady_not_from_uiState: FIXED — §What to do step 1 and §Details both contain explicit: НЕ выводить из _uiState with rationale (warmupInFlight not exposed in ChatUiState)
task_6.combine_sources_correct: VERIFIED — Task 6 specifies combine(registry.models, _chatModelId, warmupCoordinator.isWarmupInProgress) which is the correct 3-flow subset for the boolean readiness derivation. The actual topAppBarState uses a 4th flow (registry.activeModelName) for model-name display; that 4th flow is not needed for the engineReady boolean and its absence is intentional and correct.

findings.issue: Task 6 §What to do step 1 and §Details both describe the combine as 'те же трёх source flows, что питают topAppBarState (см. lines 253–260)'. The actual topAppBarState uses four flows: registry.models, _chatModelId, warmupCoordinator.isWarmupInProgress, AND registry.activeModelName. Directing the implementer to lines 253-260 and calling it 'three flows' is factually inaccurate (those lines show four args). The 3-flow approach for engineReady is correct for the use case, but the 'mirror topAppBarState' framing slightly misleads — the implementer reading lines 253-260 will count four flows and may wonder whether to include activeModelName.
findings.fix: In §What to do step 1 and §Details, note: 'topAppBarState actually combines four flows (the fourth is registry.activeModelName used only for display name); engineReady omits it because only the initStatus + warmup boolean is needed.' This prevents implementer confusion when they count the args at lines 253-260.

2.notes: All round 1 findings resolved. Signature nullable default preserved. StandardTestDispatcher mandate correct. Reviewer paths project-relative. No new issues.

3.notes: All round 1 findings resolved. applyMaxTokens sequence corrected to [stopResponse, cleanup, initialize]. FakeModelRegistry update section present. Ready-wait ordering after applyEffectiveConfigToModel explicit. MAX_TOKENS configValues assertion preserved. engineReady_combinatorics absent from TDD Anchor.

6.notes: Round 1 fixes confirmed. One minor: 'те же трёх source flows' framing slightly misleads since topAppBarState has four (the 3-flow approach itself is correct). No blocking issues.
